name: Vincent Galien
bio:
Physical Appearance: Breton male wearing a full set of steel armor - cuirass, boots, greaves, and gauntlets. Wields a steel longsword for training and combat.
Race: Breton
Personality Keywords: low-ranking, idle, disciplined
Role: Vincent Galien is a drillmaster and apprentice at the Fighters Guild chapter in Bravil. As the lowest ranking member in the guildhall, he hasn't been given many responsibilities.
Home Location Information: The Fighters Guild hall in Bravil, where he sleeps on the 2nd floor.
Daily Routine: Vincent sleeps on the 2nd floor from midnight to 6am. Upon waking, he spends the first four hours wandering around the ground floor. At 10am, he begins a lengthy sparring session against Tadrose Helas that continues until 4pm. After sparring, he wanders around the guildhall until dinnertime at 6pm, when he sits at the table to eat with his fellow guildmembers. At 8pm, he gets up and spends the rest of the evening strolling lazily around the hall until returning to the 2nd floor to find his bed at midnight. He removes his armor at night.
Training Regimen: Vincent spends six hours each day sparring with Tadrose Helas, maintaining his combat skills despite his low rank and lack of assigned duties.
author: Bethesda
